overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a snowy forest at night toward a fortified village entrance. The character passes a burning torch and enters through a wooden gate guarded by NPCs before walking into the village interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest trail with stone retaining wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path bordered by a stone wall on the right and forest on the left

entered.detail: low stone retaining wall running alongside the path
snow-dusted dirt trail winding through the forest
tall evergreen trees lining the left side of the path
large boulder formation visible beyond the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow forest trail at night during a light snowfall. A stone wall runs along the right side of the path while pine trees line the left, creating a partially enclosed corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open forest path approaching fortified settlement

events.description: character passes a burning torch mounted on the left, casting warm orange light on the snow

agents.ego_description: continuing along the widening path toward a distant illuminated gate structure

entered.detail: large fortified wooden gate with lit torches visible on the horizon
flaming torch mounted on a post illuminating the path

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a wider forest clearing as the character approaches a distant fortified gate. A burning torch provides the first artificial light source along the route before the character continues toward the settlement entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortified village entrance with wooden palisade walls

events.description: character passes through the wooden gate into the village interior

agents.ego_description: approaching the fortified gate and passing between guards into the village

notable_agents.action: guard standing with polearm watching the character approach the gate
guard standing near the gate entrance holding a weapon

entered.detail: tall sharpened wooden stakes forming the defensive wall
tall sharpened wooden stakes forming the defensive wall

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the imposing wooden gate of the settlement, flanked by palisade walls and guarded by armed sentries. After passing the guards, the character walks through the gate into the village interior.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village street with wooden houses

events.description: village buildings with lit windows become clearly visible as character moves deeper into the settlement

agents.ego_description: walking through the village street passing wooden longhouses and a guard carrying a torch

notable_agents.action: villager walking with a burning torch, passing the character on the right

entered.detail: traditional wooden building with steep roof and lit windows
stone staircase leading up to a building entrance
low wooden fence lining the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: Inside the village, the character walks along a dirt street lined with wooden longhouses and stone steps. A villager carrying a torch passes by as snow continues to fall gently over the settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, snowy forest trail into the heart of a fortified village at night. It begins along a narrow path enclosed by a stone wall and towering pine trees under a light snowfall. As the trail opens into a wider clearing, the camera follows the character past a flickering burning torch toward a distant settlement entrance. The scene then shifts to the imposing wooden gate and palisade walls, where the character passes armed sentries to enter the village. Finally, the movement continues along a dirt street lined with wooden longhouses and stone steps as a torch-bearing villager passes by in the falling snow.
